notes: v10 removes noisy black overlay fragments from the part patch pass.
Eyes are now explicit manual polygons pose-by-pose.
Part overlays render without outline to avoid debug-looking internal scribbles.
v11 adjusts eye coordinates so every visible-face pose has an explicit simple eye polygon in the correct face region.
v12 enlarges and repositions the manual eye slits so they clearly read in the final sheet.
v13 treats eyes as a first-class high-weight target.
All visible-face poses use explicit simple eye polygons placed from the reference head crops.
v14 narrows and repositions the top_front eye slits to match the original reference more closely.
